qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_cond_ingreso as oi_cond_ingreso, t0.c_cond_ingreso as c_cond_ingreso, t0.d_cond_ingreso as d_cond_ingreso, SEC.policy, t0.c_cond_ingreso as CODE, t0.d_cond_ingreso as TEXT FROM LEG46_COND_INGRESO as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.CondicionesIngreso.COND_INGRESO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_cond_ingreso LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_cond_ingreso asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_cond_ingreso as oi_cond_ingreso, SEC.policy FROM LEG46_COND_INGRESO as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.CondicionesIngreso.COND_INGRESO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_cond_ingreso LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_cond_ingreso asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.CondicionesIngreso.COND_INGRESO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.CondicionesIngreso.COND_INGRESO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG46_COND_INGRESO.oi_cond_ingreso) as CNT from LEG46_COND_INGRESO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG46_COND_INGRESO.oi_cond_ingreso={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG46_COND_INGRESO.d_cond_ingreso,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG46_COND_INGRESO.c_cond_ingreso,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
